# Wilfred Morgan — Enterprise AI Architect
# https://wilfredmorgan.com

## About
Wilfred Morgan is an enterprise AI architect with 20+ years of experience
deploying production AI systems in regulated industries including financial
services, healthcare, and energy. He specializes in agentic AI implementation,
generative AI architecture, multi-agent orchestration, RAG pipeline design,
and AI maturity assessment. His technology stack includes Azure OpenAI,
Semantic Kernel, Microsoft Copilot Studio, LangChain, LangFlow, and Python.

## Expertise
- Enterprise AI Implementation
- Agentic AI Architecture and Deployment
- Generative AI Architecture
- RAG Pipeline Design for Enterprise Knowledge Bases
- Multi-Agent Orchestration in Governed Environments
- AI Maturity Assessment (5-Level Framework)
- AI-Driven SDLC Transformation
- Zero-Trust AI Security for Regulated Industries
- Microsoft Copilot Studio Architecture
- Azure OpenAI Implementation

## Industries
- Financial Services (11+ years, former banking CIO)
- Healthcare (Document Intelligence, Conversational AI, HIPAA)
- Energy and Manufacturing (Operational AI, Workflow Automation)

## Services
- AI Architecture Strategy Calls (90-minute engagements)
- Conference Speaking (Keynotes, Panels)
- Enterprise AI Consulting

- Blog: https://wilfredmorgan.com/writing
